business.name: Heritage excavation & concrete LLC.
business.tagline: Built to last in Rock Hill

hero.headline: Driveways that *look right* and last decades
hero.subheadline: Mike and the Heritage crew pour concrete the old-school way — level, solid, and built for whatever Carolina weather throws at it.

services_section.label: WHAT WE POUR
services_section.heading: Concrete work that stands the test
services_section.subheading: From your front steps to that long driveway you've been planning

services.title: Residential Driveways
services.description: New pours and replacements. We work with you on the design and handle all the prep work.

services.title: Foundation Work
services.description: Solid foundations for homes, garages, and outbuildings. Level and built to code.

services.title: Concrete Slabs
services.description: Patios, walkways, and shop floors. Reinforced properly and finished smooth.

services.title: Site Excavation
services.description: Dirt work, grading, and site prep. Getting the ground ready for whatever comes next.

about.heading: Heritage Excavation & Concrete
about.body: We're a Rock Hill concrete crew that shows up when we say we will. Mike and the team handle everything from excavation to the final finish.

reviews.name: James G.
reviews.text: Needed a long driveway poured after moving in. Mike and his team listened and worked with us on all our changes. Great work and great people.

reviews.name: William W.
reviews.text: Mike and crew are great people and 10/10 on quality of work!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: Great business. Honest and great quality of work.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Rock Hill and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local concrete contractors covering York County

cta.heading: Ready to pour your project?
cta.body: Get a straight quote on your concrete work. We'll walk the site and give you an honest price.
